calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Theodore Hellman (Counsel for Well Fargo Bank, Personal Representative).

Mr. Hellman briefly addressed the Examiner's Notes concerning the want of itemization and detail with respect to the firm's tax preparation services. The Court thereafter took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Omar de Leon; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Pamela Meyers.

Post Script: Subsequent to the hearing, the Court granted the Petition and signed the Order for same on June 6, 2007. RMD

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Continued To Jun-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2348 Mission Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ingrid Shaw (Counsel for Wells Fargo Bank, Executor)

After the announcement of the sale in open court by the Court, the Court confirmed the sale of the property by overbid in the amount of $897,050.00 without bond. Ms. Shaw is to prepare the Order and submit the same.

Judicial Officer: Herbert Donaldson, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
